SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.loader

Class JP2KeYTypeConverter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.loader.JP2KeYTypeConverter
public class JP2KeYTypeConverter extends Object
provide means to convert recoder types to the corresponding KeY type structures.

Results are stored in a HashMap so that subsequent queries will retrieve the same result.

The main method is:

get

Since:
jul-07

    • JP2KeYTypeConverter

  • Method Details

    • getTypeConverter

      public TypeConverter getTypeConverter()

    • getServices

      public Services getServices()

    • getKeYJavaType

      public KeYJavaType getKeYJavaType(String typeName)
      return the corresponding KeY JavaType for a recoder type.

      Return the cached value if present - otherwise create a new type. Store this in the cache.

      This method retrieves the recoder nameinfo and queries it for the type for typeName and passes this result to getKeYJavaType(ResolvedType)

      Parameters:
      typeName - name of a type to be converted
      Returns:
      the KJT for the string representation.
      See Also:
      • getKeYJavaType(ResolvedType)

    • getKeYJavaType

      public KeYJavaType getKeYJavaType(String typeName, boolean forceInit)

    • getKeYJavaType

      public @NonNull KeYJavaType getKeYJavaType(com.github.javaparser.resolution.types.ResolvedType type)
      return the corresponding KeY JavaType for a recoder type.

      Returned the cached value if present - otherwise create a new type.

      Parameters:
      type - type to be converted, may be null
      Returns:
      a keytype.

    • createKeYJavaType
